author: Swapnil Sawant
name: Warmdown-Tuned Training on 1xRTX 5090
blurb: Systematic experiment-driven optimization across 9+ experiments. Key discovery: warmdown_iters=3000 produces best results (2.6x per-step efficiency). Hard token analysis revealed juncture-point bottleneck guiding architecture experiments. Layer looping (6 unique layers, 608 dim, looped to 9 effective) + wider model in progress. Best result 1.2987 BPB on 1xRTX 5090 (1200s).
